title: CNBC Daily Open: Chips are down, OpenAI's woos the White House, and Russia strikes
summary_full: Global stocks take their cue from a chip-led sell-off on Wall Street as OpenAI reportedly considers selling a stake to the U.S. government.
summary_public: Global stocks take their cue from a chip-led sell-off on Wall Street as OpenAI reportedly considers selling a stake to the U.S. government.
